name: Silly Stickmen - AvA
description:
"But-"
"No Buts, man- lay off."

~~~~~~

A group of stickmen on a farm that you are visiting, pretty chaotic.

//Reviews and Feedback is welcome! I'm also trying out the 'multiple scenario' option that is currently offered... so:

  • Scenario 1: You come as a friend to the farm

  • Scenario 2: You are an enforcer from Rocket Corp. coming to the farm, on duty
